name: GCP Artifact Registry canonical image cleanup
__comment__: Delete canonical digest-keyed GAR image nodes only after repository-image, manifest, and migration cleanup have removed stale references.

statements.__comment__: Delete canonical digest-keyed GAR images that no graph relationship still uses.
statements.query: MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage) WHERE NOT exists((img)--()) WITH img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE img RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
